economic_notes: Government business enterprise: Mishkosiminiziibiing Development Corporation, accounted for using modified equity method. First Nation also operates campground activities.
notes: Audit opinion is qualified due to campground revenue completeness limitation — auditors unable to verify campground activity revenues. Tangible capital assets include $1,659,855 under construction (new housing and Cultural Centre). GBE is Mishkosiminiziibiing Development Corporation. Total government transfers estimated by summing ISC, Ministry of Community and Social Services, Health Canada, Weechi-It-Te-Win, Ontario First Nations Limited Partnership, CMHC, Ministry of Health, Shooniyaa Wa-Biitong, and Grand Council Treaty #3. OSR estimated as total revenue minus these transfers. Health and Social Services expense line ($3,642,147) used for expenses_health; Band support ($3,073,113) used for expenses_administration; Commercial and other ($761,294) used for expenses_enterprises.
warnings: Qualified audit opinion issued — financial statements may not fully reflect true position
